fields.name: trip_id_performed
fields.title: ID referencing trips_performed.trip_id_performed
fields.description: Identifies the trip performed. Optional if crew assignment is at vehicle level only.

fields.name: crew_id
fields.title: ID referencing operators.operator_id
fields.description: Identifies the crew member. References operators table.

fields.name: crew_role
fields.description: Role of the crew member on the vehicle.

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the crew member's assignment began.

fields.name: end_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the crew member's assignment ended. Null if assignment is ongoing.

name: vehicle_crew.schema.json
description: Crew member assignments to vehicles and trips, supporting multiple crew members and mid-trip reliefs.
